mapper.select:
SELECT pqe.id, pqe.fid, pqe.fbillno, bd.name as f_ora_unitid, pqe.f_bz, pqe.f_tp, suer.name as f_gys, pqe.f_cptp1, pqe.f_jgyxq, pqe.f_cgjg, pqe.f_zxqdl, pqe.f_xcpms, pqe.f_stgys, pqe.f_xdl, bm.number as f_cpdm1, pqe.f_ywbz, bm.image as f_wltp, pqe.f_cpms1, pqe.f_bzmx, pqe.f_cty_baseproperty4, pqe.f_ywtp1, pqe.f_ywtp2, pqe.f_zxs, pqe.f_mz, pqe.f_jz, pqe.f_c, pqe.f_k, pqe.f_g, pqe.f_cghsj, pqe.f_cty_baseproperty, pqe.fgctp, pqe.fyjjhrq, pqe.fbzcc, pqe.fcgshys, su.user_name as f_fbjry, pqe.f_ywpm, pqe.f_ywms, pqe.f_cty_text, pqe.fkhhh, pqe.fqty_kc, pqe.fzxss, pqe.ftj, pqe.fmzz, pqe.fkhxq, pqe.fcgxpms, pqe.fxgyslxr, pqe.fxgyslxfs FROM purchase_quotation_entry pqe
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on pqe.f_ora_unitid=bd.kingdee LEFT JOIN supplier suer on pqe.f_gys=suer.supplierid LEFT JOIN by_material bm on pqe.f_cpdm1=bm.k3_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pqe.f_fbjry=su.k3_key
WHERE pqe.fid = #{fid} ORDER BY pqe.id

SELECT pqe.id, pqe.fid, pqe.fbillno, bd.name as f_ora_unitid, pqe.f_bz, pqe.f_tp, suer.name as f_gys, pqe.f_cptp1, pqe.f_jgyxq, pqe.f_cgjg, pqe.f_zxqdl, pqe.f_xcpms, pqe.f_stgys, pqe.f_xdl, bm.number as f_cpdm1, pqe.f_ywbz, bm.image as f_wltp, pqe.f_cpms1, pqe.f_bzmx, pqe.f_cty_baseproperty4, pqe.f_ywtp1, pqe.f_ywtp2, pqe.f_zxs, pqe.f_mz, pqe.f_jz, pqe.f_c, pqe.f_k, pqe.f_g, pqe.f_cghsj, pqe.f_cty_baseproperty, pqe.fgctp, pqe.fyjjhrq, pqe.fbzcc, pqe.fcgshys, su.user_name as f_fbjry, pqe.f_ywpm, pqe.f_ywms, pqe.f_cty_text, pqe.fkhhh, pqe.fqty_kc, pqe.fzxss, pqe.ftj, pqe.fmzz, pqe.fkhxq, pqe.fcgxpms, pqe.fxgyslxr, pqe.fxgyslxfs FROM purchase_quotation_entry pqe
LEFT JOIN bymaterial_dictionary bd on pqe.f_ora_unitid=bd.kingdee LEFT JOIN supplier suer on pqe.f_gys=suer.supplierid LEFT JOIN by_material bm on pqe.f_cpdm1=bm.k3_id LEFT JOIN sys_user su on pqe.f_fbjry=su.k3_key WHERE pqe.fbillno = #{billNo} ORDER BY pqe.id
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO purchase_quotation_entry ( id, fid, fbillno, f_ora_unitid, f_bz, f_tp, f_gys, f_cptp1, f_jgyxq, f_cgjg, f_zxqdl, f_xcpms, f_stgys, f_xdl, f_cpdm1, f_ywbz, f_wltp, f_cpms1, f_bzmx, f_cty_baseproperty4, f_ywtp1, f_ywtp2, f_zxs, f_mz, f_jz, f_c, f_k, f_g, f_cghsj, f_cty_baseproperty, fgctp, fyjjhrq, fbzcc, fcgshys, f_fbjry, f_ywpm, f_ywms, f_cty_text, fkhhh, fqty_kc, fzxss, ftj, fmzz, fkhxq, fcgxpms, fxgyslxr, fxgyslxfs ) VALUES
( #{item.id}, #{item.fid}, #{item.fbillno}, #{item.fOraUnitId}, #{item.fBz}, #{item.fTp}, #{item.fGys}, #{item.fCptp1}, #{item.fJgyxq}, #{item.fCgjg}, #{item.fZxqdl}, #{item.fXcpms}, #{item.fStgys}, #{item.fXdl}, #{item.fCpdm1}, #{item.fYwbz}, #{item.fWltp}, #{item.fCpms1}, #{item.fBzmx}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty4}, #{item.fYwtp1}, #{item.fYwtp2}, #{item.fZxs}, #{item.fMz}, #{item.fJz}, #{item.fC}, #{item.fK}, #{item.fG}, #{item.fCghsj}, #{item.fCtyBaseproperty}, #{item.fgctp}, #{item.fyjjhrq}, #{item.fbzcc}, #{item.fcgshys}, #{item.fFbjry}, #{item.fYwpm}, #{item.fYwms}, #{item.fCtyText}, #{item.fkhhh}, #{item.fqtyKc}, #{item.fzxss}, #{item.ftj}, #{item.fmzz}, #{item.fkhxq}, #{item.fcgxpms}, #{item.fxgyslxr}, #{item.fxgyslxfs} )
